subcodes.first_line: Exalted, exalted is He Who stood before all faces and spoke that which draweth the servants nigh unto the One, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی تعالی من قام امام الوجوه و نطق بما یقرب العباد الی الفرد الخبیر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
